title: Innovation Labs, ML and Digital Investment UX — Manulife, Singapore
summary: Innovation-lab, machine-learning, investment, field-research, internal-platform, and 3D experience work across Singapore and Asia Pacific.
body:
Innovation Labs, ML, and digital-investment UX at Manulife combines internal innovation infrastructure, machine-learning-enabled experience design, and field research across Singapore and Asia Pacific.

Included projects
- 3D VR Innovation Space
- Internal Innovation Portal
- Lean AI UX Field Research in Cambodia
- ML/AI/Data UX and Interaction Design
- Digital Fund Purchase

Strategic and technical themes
- Innovation-lab environments that make new ideas testable and legible inside the organisation.
- ML, AI, and data-informed UX for investment and customer journeys.
- Field research to understand adoption and operational reality in-market.
- Internal portals and knowledge-sharing structures that help scale innovation programs.

Proof connection
- This record can connect to the existing Manulife Lean ML UX proof across 11 markets.
- It should not collapse all projects into a single unsupported outcome claim.

Retrieval guidance
- Use this record for Manulife-specific questions, innovation labs, digital fund purchase, Cambodia field research, or 3D/VR innovation work.

claims: Joz worked on innovation-lab, ML/AI/data UX, internal platform, investment, field-research, and 3D experience initiatives at Manulife.
The programme spanned both customer-facing and internal innovation contexts across Singapore and Asia Pacific.
proof_points: The broader Manulife proof already covers Lean ML UX across 11 markets.
This grouped programme record preserves the individual project names for employer-specific retrieval.
projects: Lean AI UX Field Research in Cambodia
metadata.source_notes: Grouped programme record. No single unsupported metric is attributed across all included projects.
